honoree.name: Erwin O. Rieger
honoree.summary: [UNVERIFIED] The highway is named 'Erwin O. Rieger Memorial Highway' in Washington, but the Wikipedia article is for 'Fred Upton', a U.S. Representative from Michigan. The names do not match, and there is no indication that Fred Upton is connected to Washington or the memorial highway.

honoree.name: Spirit Lake
honoree.summary: [UNVERIFIED] The provided Wikipedia article text appears to be a generic Wikipedia interface and does not contain any biographical information about Harry R. Truman. The Spirit Lake Memorial Highway in Washington is named after Harry R. Truman, who was a notable local figure and innkeeper who died in the 1980 Mount St. Helens eruption. Without biographical content in the snippet, it cannot be confirmed as the correct article.
